name: @bandari/mobile
description: Bandari mobile app (Expo / React Native) — scaffolded now, built later. Consumes @bandari/shared.

scripts.dev: echo "(mobile) scaffold only. Run: pnpm mobile:bootstrap (see README) to add Expo deps, then 'expo start'."
scripts.build: echo "(mobile) scaffold only — nothing to build yet."
scripts.typecheck: echo "(mobile) scaffold only — typecheck enabled after Expo deps are installed."
